name: ADD YOUR NAME (via DSCC)
subject: ❌ DENOUNCE DeVos, Friend ❌
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d3a/1877910272/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-devos?source=PT-20170129-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")
---
We've got to act FAST, Friend!

The Senate is voting this week on the confirmation of Betsy DeVos as the Secretary of Education. That means a corporate billionaire will run our public schools into the ground unless we mobilize NOW. [**Add your name to join Senate Democrats in rejecting DeVos ' nomination >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d3a/1877910272/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-devos?source=PT-20170129-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

Not only is it highly suspicious that DeVos dumped millions into the pockets of Republicans, but her disastrous hearing proved she is wholly unprepared to head our public education system:
* She didn't know federal law protected students with disabilities -- and wouldn't commit to enforcing it!
* She said schools don't need to be gun-free zones (because of - and we're not kidding -- "bears")!
* She refused to rule out slashing funding to public schools... or even privatizing them!
* She won't commit to holding schools accountable for investigating instances of sexual harassment or violence!

[**Friend, we can 't entrust our children's futures to someone who believes things like that! Add your name to oppose DeVos' nomination before the Senate votes >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d3a/1877910272/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-devos?source=PT-20170129-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name:** Friend
****Last Petition Signed** : **N/A
**Oppose Betsy DeVos' Nomination:**[**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d3a/1877910272/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-devos?source=PT-20170129-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

Because of these blatant red flags, Senate Democrats like Elizabeth Warren and Tim Kaine demanded a second committee hearing to further question DeVos, _but Republicans shut it down._ **Now we have to SHUT DOWN her confirmation, ****Friend****. And Senate Democrats from Bernie Sanders to Joe Donnelly agree - she should not be our next Secretary of Education.**

[**If you care about the future of education in our country - from attending pre-K to affording college - then we need you to make your voice heard: Add your name to take a stand against DeVos >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d3a/1877910272/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-devos?source=PT-20170129-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

****A quick note on donations, Friend:****

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[****Contribute****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170129-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d34/1877910272/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec64/2b07114c/47e32dd0/73693d37/1877910272/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: Greg Gianforte
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Special Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
I wanted you to be among the first to hear that when my good friend Congressman Ryan Zinke is confirmed as our Secretary of Interior and a Special Election is called, I will seek the nomination at the MTGOP Delegate Convention. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)
---
Friend - I have some exciting news to share with you.

I wanted you to be among the first to hear that when my good friend Congressman Ryan Zinke is confirmed as our Secretary of Interior and a Special Election is called, **I will seek the nomination to fill our open House seat at the MTGOP Delegate Convention.**

In anticipation of the nominating convention taking place in the near future, I paid my filing fee to ensure I'm fully prepared to hit the ground running if - _or I should say WHEN_ - the vacancy is declared.

The direction of our country will be decided in the coming months and I decided to undertake this challenge because you deserve to have your voice heard and a champion who will always be on Montana's side.

**This race will be ground zero and the first official battle waged by the Democrats to stop the Republican/Trump agenda. I simply will not stand on the sidelines and allow that to happen. I'm ready to fight for our shared Montana values.**

**[Friend, that's why your support is needed from the beginning when a Special Election is called.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)**

| [** Donate Today **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)
---

Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama and their liberal allies will most certainly view this potential vacancy as their "phoenix rising from the ashes" moment. Expect millions upon millions of dollars to be poured into our state by the Democrats and their cadre of lobbyists, special interests and political action committees.

I feel the undeniable call to join the fight to drain the swamp. I will be on Montana's side - _NOT the side of the lobbyists, special interests, and elites._

It's time to give the power back to the people. Washington may not like this, but it's time America and Montana come first.

**[Bottom line: I will need your support to ensure I have the necessary resources to fight back and defeat my liberal Democrat opponent once the vacancy is declared.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)**

I'll lead the charge to bring accountability to Washington:
* A balanced budget.
* Term limits.
* A ban to end the business of members of Congress from becoming lobbyists.

You can count on me to fight back against the D.C. elites who can't point to Montana on a map, yet have no problem imposing burdensome regulations that threaten to devastate our livelihoods.

**I'll stand strong for our Montana way of life:** Defending the Second Amendment. Standing for our Constitution. Protecting our coal and timber jobs. I'll stop the terrible trade deals that have hurt our economy and send jobs to places like China.

**I've spent my life in business creating Montana jobs.** I started a company here nearly two decades ago that employs five hundred Montanans. This success was the result of Montana work ethic and strong leadership. But you don't find this mentality back in Washington. It's just another reason why it's time to drain the swamp!

We have precious little time to build our campaign war chest. We only have a very short amount of time to build our grassroots army that will represent what is truly good for Montana and not for liberal special interest groups and the DC elite.

**[Friend, can I count on you to be one of the earliest supporters by making a campaign contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or more today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)**

I'm humbled to have received the support of more than 100 voting central committee members, representing 139 total votes - **a majority of the potential state central committee votes at the upcoming nominating convention.**

My word and bond to you is that once elected, I will continue the legacy of representing strong Republican values for our great state. **[Please stand with me as I run to be on Montana's side and help President Trump bring true change to Washington.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)**

I hope you're with me.

For Montana!

Greg Gianforte

P.S. Friend, I need your help. With the Democrats eyeing this race as the start of their redemption story, they will be firing up the Obama political machine and pouring millions upon millions of dollars into this race, once the vacancy is declared. [**Become one of the first supporters by following this secure link to make your contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)

[** Donate Today **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/40215240:s1jkLolNE:m:1:1494336505:C22C25958497610F679E7E5214006B5C:r)
---

| Paid for by Greg for Montana
---

subject: Act Today to Help Sen. Chris Murphy Overturn the "Muslim Ban"
body:
(http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/stop_muslim_ban?source=demscom170130-muslim-ban)

(http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/stop_muslim_ban?source=demscom170130-muslim-ban) Dear Activist,

Like many of you, I was horrified to read the stories of people being detained and turned around at airports across the country as a result of President Trump's illegal "Muslim ban."

My heart broke for the families fleeing violence and terror who were set to arrive in the United States this week only to have those plans dashed by an unconscionable abandonment of our founding principles.

But then I saw the crowds begin to gather at JFK Airport in New York City. And Logan in Boston. O'Hare in Chicago. Bradley in Hartford, Connecticut. LAX, IAD, ATL, PHX, SFO, and many others. I was inspired by photos on Twitter of lawyers volunteering their time in airport restaurants. And then we won legal battles in New York, Boston, and Virginia. And in some places, people who had been held up were let through customs.

And the response this weekend made one thing clear to me: there is no anger or anxiety that you feel that cannot be cured by political action. This week, I am going to do my part to act as well.

This week, I am going to introduce legislation to immediately overturn Donald Trump's dangerous and hateful executive order. I want you to add your name as a citizen co-sponsor and then forward this email to your friends and ask them to do the same.

Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my legislation overturning Donald Trump's illegal Muslim ban that flies in the face of America's founding principles. (http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/stop_muslim_ban?source=demscom170130-muslim-ban)

As I said in my Huffington Post piece earlier this week, we are a nation founded by religious refugees. Over and over we have opened our doors to those fleeing war and terror. We have it within our power to protect ourselves from terror and to rescue our neighbors from terror.

And we must do both.

Every best wish,

Chris Murphy
U.S. Senator, Connecticut

(http://action.chrismurphy.com/page/s/stop_muslim_ban?source=demscom170130-muslim-ban)
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTIyLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvNzYxNjYzMjM=

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Shaughnessy Naughton
subject: immediate collateral damage
body:
Friend --

President Trump's fear and paranoia know no bounds. He's already trying to suppress facts he doesn't like. And now, Trump's ban on Muslim immigrants and refugees is hurting our scientific community as well. This assault on science is an assault on our values.

It hasn't even been four days since Trump's executive order and already, the scientific community is beginning to suffer. A prominent Iranian scientist, set to study cardiovascular disease at Harvard, was turned away Saturday. Already, the ban is affecting students traveling abroad. The _New York Times_ called it the "immediate collateral damage" of Trump's executive order.

**[We can't let Trump's war on science grow into a war on the scientists that are helping move our country forward. Add your name and tell Trump: The Muslim and refugee ban is unacceptable »](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3988686078541299712/1664670500057513984)**

The American scientific community has grown and thrived thanks to the invaluable contributions made by immigrants and people of all faiths, including Islam. Trump's aggressive anti-immigrant and anti-Muslim policies threaten the progress we've made as a nation.

It's not just one scientist in an isolated incident. The ban is affecting students worldwide. Many students, legal residents of the United States, with visas or green cards, have been turned away or detained at airports. This has the potential to set us back decades. Social justice advocate Hazami Barmada called it "a slap in the face" to the students and scientists who are dedicating their lives to service.

**[We must hold Trump accountable for his war on science and his persecution of scientists and students. Make your voice heard today»](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3988686078541299712/1664670500057513984)**

Together,
Shaughnessy Naughton
314 Action

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: ACTION: Calling all Democratic Senators
body:
Every hour the Senate delays is one less hour for Trump and his administration to cause more damage to our democracy.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Last week, Trump signed more than a dozen executive orders. With a stroke of his pen, Trump forced the Keystone XL and Dakota Access Pipelines back into the conversation. He took action to defund sanctuary cities, which provide protection from deportation for undocumented immigrants and families. **And, on Friday, he signed what is effectively a Muslim ban.**
Over the weekend, thousands took to the streets, standing in solidarity with communities threatened by the executive orders and in defense of our environment. Today we need you to channel that same energy and passion and call upon our Democratic Senators to fight against Trump's agenda.
The nominations of Betsy DeVos and Jeff Sessions to important cabinet positions are troubling to Americans across the political spectrum. Our education and justice systems are cornerstones of our history as a nation and our shared experience, and they must be led by qualified people who will protect them.
**Democratic Senators must be bold and stand with the working class.** Under Senate rules, up to 30 hours of floor debate are permitted for each cabinet nominee.
[**Please take 5 minutes to call your senator and encourage them to use the full 30 hours for debate on Trump 's cabinet picks. Our very democracy is at risk -- and we must fight back.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-30-hours/?source=em170130-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-30-hours/?source=em170130-full")
There are 1,450 days until Trump leaves office. That means 1,450 days of fighting back against his radical agenda for our nation and the world.
We're fighting back every day for millions of people being targeted by the Trump administration. And we're calling on Senate Democrats to step up and join us. Each Democratic Senator must debate each of Trump's Cabinet Nominees for the full 30 hours allotted. **Every hour the Senate delays is one less hour for Trump and his cronies to cause more damage to our economy and our values.**
[**Will you call your senator and encourage them to utilize the full 30 hours on Trump 's cabinet nominees?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-30-hours/?source=em170130-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-30-hours/?source=em170130-full")
Our Democratic leaders should have the backbone to stand up against Trump's reign of terror. That's why Our Revolution is partnering with 60 organizations in calling on Senate Democrats to join us in the resistance.
We need you with us in this fight. Thanks for stepping up today - and every day.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CALL MY SENATOR NOW»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-30-hours/?source=em170130-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-30-hours/?source=em170130-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: If you are outraged, I ask you read this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
For centuries, the United States has been a beacon of hope for immigrants and refugees from around the world. We are an immigrant nation and that has always been what makes America strong. | Friend,

For centuries, the United States has been a beacon of hope for immigrants and refugees from around the world. We are an immigrant nation and that has always been what makes America strong.

The Trump executive order banning refugees, immigrants, visitors, and -- even Lawful Permanent Residents (Green Card holders) -- from 7 Muslim countries does not represent the America you and I know and love. This order is not about making our borders safer and our vetting procedures more comprehensive. It is an outrageous and unprecedented ban that singles out individuals due to their faith.

This executive action is inconsistent with current laws and it will make Americans less safe. We are gathering names for a petition to deliver a powerful message to the Republican Congressional leadership - denounce this outrageous threat to our nation.

**[Join me in signing our petition to denounce the President's Muslim ban and to ask the Republican leadership to stand up for the freedoms they give lip service to. Our voices are louder together.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b29/70cdc2ba/4743fefb/39791ec/2421895408/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-stand-against-trump-s-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Join+me+in+signing+our+petition+to+denou&utm_campaign=em013017&source=em013017")**

We will fight this and do everything we can to protect our country. I am working with my colleagues in the Senate to introduce legislation to overturn this ban. Thank you to all of you who joined the rallies this weekend at the White House, Dulles Airport, BWI and elsewhere. This is the moment to act!

**[Join me today in adding your name and be sure to send to five of your friends.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b29/70cdc2ba/4743fefb/39791ed/2421895408/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-stand-against-trump-s-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+today+in+adding+your+name+and+be&utm_campaign=em013017&source=em013017")**

So proud to be your Senator,

Chris

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: 💪 Let's do this.
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7267/24c69fd9/faf53585/18e1cac4/2755075942/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE136N_digital_email_20170130_EOMLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE136N_digital_email_20170130_EOMLaunch_n-all")
---

Peter,

This community is seriously fired up.

It's no surprise, given that Donald Trump was just inaugurated and wasted no time making good on his campaign promises. Many of us took part in women's marches around the country (and the world!), and were back at it this past weekend to protest his ban on Muslims and refugees entering our country.

Now it's time to finish January out strong. Our End-of-Month deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and we're making our 2017 plans based on how big this community is ready to go.

**[Donate $3 before our January deadline to help support the pro-choice Democratic women who will stand up to Trump and his allies.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7267/24c69fd9/faf53585/18e1cac5/2755075942/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170130_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+before+our+January+deadline+to+&utm_campaign=WQEFE136N_digital_email_20170130_EOMLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE136N_digital_email_20170130_EOMLaunch_n-all")**

This month has been huge for our movement. The day after the women's march, EMILY's List and six partner organizations trained 500 women who want to run for office for the first time.

Last week, we closed out our best online membership week for EMILY's List ever.

It'd be easy to just tune out and give up in times like this -- but that isn't this community's style.

I know we'll continue raising our voices and electing women to hold Trump and his allies accountable every step of the way.

**Donate $3 before tomorrow at midnight to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/End-January-Strong](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7267/24c69fd9/faf53585/18e1cac6/2755075942/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170130_email_EOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgEndJanuaryStrong&utm_campaign=WQEFE136N_digital_email_20170130_EOMLaunch_n-all&source=WQEFE136N_digital_email_20170130_EOMLaunch_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List
